name: Veronica, The Feisty Dommy Mommy.
description:
**(All Characters 18+)**

You left home on an impulse trip with your friends, and now have to deal with the full wrath of a Horny Latina Dommy Mommy.

May as well toss these two as separate bots, since its easy enough. Also gonna give them the Thought Bubble. Sophie should be out right after this.

(Art by Cinnabus)
creator: wisperrr
